properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a name I love to hear, I love to sing its worth; It sounds like music in mine ear, The sweetest name on earth.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, how I love Jesus, Oh, how I love Jesus, Oh, how I love Jesus, Because He first love me. (I’ll never forsake Him…)

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: It tells me what my Father hath In store for every day, And though I tread a darksome path, Yields sunshine all the way.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It tells of One whose loving heart Can feel my deepest woe, Who in each sorrow bears a part, That none can bear below.
